message:
fix(raptorq): mobile optimizations for article readability

- Reduce drop cap from 4.5rem to 3.25rem on small screens
- Scale down callout font-size from 1.5rem to 1.15rem on mobile
- Reduce body paragraph text to 1rem and KaTeX sizing to 1em on mobile
- Add overflow-x: auto to math blocks to prevent layout breakage
- Add flex-wrap to viz headers so controls don't overflow
- Reduce PrecodeViz min-width from 500px to 340px for less scrolling
- Add safe-area-inset-top to progress bar for notched devices

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -893,7 +893,7 @@ export function PrecodeViz() {
           width="100%"
           height="460"
           viewBox="0 0 700 460"
-          className="overflow-visible min-w-[500px]"
+          className="overflow-visible min-w-[340px]"
         />
         <div className="absolute bottom-4 right-4 md:bottom-6 md:right-6">
           <button onClick={animate} className="rq-btn-action">
